Keimeno CMS Demo

AI-Ready Content Platform

A modern foundation for structured publishing.

Keimeno CMS

Keimeno CMS is a lightweight, AI-enhanced content management system designed for speed, simplicity and flexibility. It gives editors and developers a clean workspace for structured publishing, landing pages and reusable content blocks.

Open admin panel

Content cards

Editorial focus

A clear content structure keeps articles, landing pages and reusable snippets manageable as the project grows.

More

Fast frontend

Bootstrap utilities, local assets and a direct EJS workflow make iteration fast without hiding the HTML.

More

Flexible deployment

The same project can be used as a dynamic local app during development and rendered into static output for delivery.

More

A CMS that balances structure, speed and presentation

The original start page combines marketing content, tabbed services, galleries, counters and content resources. This EJS version keeps the same content logic but moves it into maintainable partials and data-driven sections.

Read more

Services

Research projects need structured content, reference pages and reusable layouts. Keimeno helps teams maintain long-form knowledge without clutter.

Read more

Medical organizations benefit from clear hierarchies, accessible pages and reliable editorial updates for departments, services and patient information.

Read more

Technology teams can combine product pages, documentation and resource entries while keeping the frontend compact and understandable.

Read more

Heartbeat

Sitebreaker

Security overview

Content systems are a constant target. Keimeno keeps the editing workflow lean while making security, maintenance and operational clarity part of the platform design.

Spam SEO 70%
Malware 20%
Hacking 50%
Other 80%

Keimeno resources

A resource is a repeatable data model that generates structured entries and detail views. You define it once, then editors can add entries that automatically fit into the site architecture.

Explore resources

Resources and databases

Paris

The Eiffel Tower

A landmark entry can carry editorial text, images and contextual teaser content.

The Arc de Triomphe

Reusable card layouts make destination pages and city pages feel consistent.

The Seine

Grouped content items work well for guides, travel, directories and editorial collections.

Marseille

Notre-Dame de la Garde

Rich content cards can be fed from one source structure and reused in multiple views.

Old Port

Images, captions and grouped references stay manageable through one consistent schema.

Mediterranean routes

This approach is useful for catalogs, destinations, products and job listings.

Frankfurt

Finance district

Structured entries help teams keep high-volume content consistent across sections.

Museums and culture

Reference data, teaser text and supporting media can live in the same content model.

Transport hub

Filtered listings and detail pages become much easier once the content is modeled properly.

Prototype

Flexible schemas

Iterate on field sets and page layouts before they reach live content.

Fast preview

Partial-based templates make design adjustments quicker and less error-prone.

Reusable content logic

The same resource definition can power landing pages, detail pages and widgets.

Free your mind

Keimeno starter on EJS basis

Rebuilt from the original demo structure with reusable templates, local assets and a cleaner Bootstrap 5 implementation.
